decisions.rationale: This is the latest WP-01 document in the batch and explicitly hardens the Context Graph for execution determinism, snapshot semantics, policy-checked queries, and no-silent-mutation rules.
This document includes grammar, AST, type system, execution semantics, conflict resolution, policy packs, and security guarantees. It supersedes conceptual NPL guideline uploads.
This is the cleanest uploaded strategic blueprint for the Noetfield Developer OS orchestration and policy layer.
This document is the clearest work-package dependency and roadmap registry for remaining Developer OS components.
This is the strongest uploaded Security Agent source, but it should be formalized into WP-05 Agent Behavior Monitoring and Security Agent specs before becoming executable.
